qualifications.name: BTh

qualifications.name: BDiv
notes: Career opportunities: First step in ministerial training; Ministerial pathway in the Dutch Reformed Church; Ministerial pathway in the Uniting Reformed Church; Further denominational ministry training for Presbyterian, Anglican and Volkskerk ministry candidates.

Further study notes: To become a minister in the Dutch Reformed Church or Uniting Reformed Church, complete the BDiv and MDiv; Dutch Reformed Church candidates also need the Postgraduate Diploma in Theology: Christian Ministry.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
